title: Dekton 63PC Tarpaulin Repair Kit – Includes 3x Drop-Forged Zinc Grommet Punch Set, 30x 1/2" Rust-Proof Brass-Coated Grommets, 30x Rust-Proof Brass-Coated Washers | Ideal for Repairing Tarpaulins
availability_text: Only 10 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Complete Repair Kit: The Dekton 63PC Tarpaulin Repair Kit provides everything you need to repair tarpaulins, tents, awnings, and more. It includes 3 drop-forged zinc grommet punch tools for precision application, ensuring durability and professional-level repairs.

High-Quality Components: This kit includes 30 rust-proof, brass-coated grommets and 30 brass-coated washers, ensuring long-lasting, weather-resistant repairs that stand up to the elements. Ideal for use on heavy-duty tarpaulins, canvases, or other outdoor materials.

Durable and Rust-Resistant: The brass-coated grommets and washers resist rust and corrosion, making this kit ideal for outdoor and heavy-use applications. Whether you're patching up a tarp for your garden, truck bed, or camping gear, this kit ensures reliable, long-term protection.

Easy to Use: The drop-forged grommet punch tools allow for easy, precise grommet application, even on thick or heavy materials. The set is designed for both DIY enthusiasts and professionals, with simple-to-follow steps for quick and effective repairs.

Versatile Applications: Perfect for repairing tarps, tents, covers, or any fabric that requires durable fastening. This kit is suitable for a wide variety of uses, from fixing boat covers to repairing construction site tarps, making it a versatile addition to your toolkit.
description: From the manufacturer Dekton products offer great value for money whilst incorporating useful features which improve performance and user experience Where applicable, our products comply with the latest British and European regulations All Dekton products are manufactured to high quality standards that undergo excellent quality control through our partners worldwide DEKTON Tarpaulin Repair Kit Inner hole 9mm approx 63 pieces Set includes: 3 X Drop forged, Zinc grommet punch set 30 X Half inch rust proof, Brass coated grommets 30 X Rust proof, Brass coated washers Dekton Tarpaulin Repair Kit DEKTON TARPAULIN REPAIR KIT Item Weight 299 g Product Dimensions 13 x 0.3 x 18.3 cm Color Gold/Silver DEKTON TARPAULIN REPAIR KIT Item Weight 299 g Product Dimensions 13 x 0.3 x 18.3 cm Color Gold/Silver DEKTON TARPAULIN REPAIR KIT Item Weight 299 g Product Dimensions 13 x 0.3 x 18.3 cm Color Gold/Silver DEKTON TARPAULIN REPAIR KIT Item Weight 299 g Product Dimensions 13 x 0.3 x 18.3 cm Color Gold/Silver Tarpaulin Repair Kit Groummets Punch Set Brass Coated Groummets Rust Proof
